2026-06-11TCCanada Marine ActAppointment of a director of the Vancouver Fraser Port AuthorityAppointment of Pamela Schwann of Regina, Saskatchewan, to be a director of the Vancouver Fraser Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Appointment of a director of the Vancouver Fraser Port Authority
precis: Appointment of Pamela Schwann of Regina, Saskatchewan, to be a director of the Vancouver Fraser Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years.
